Update with TaskUpdate-style entries when submitting/retrieving Aristotle jobs. Use this to distinguish JacobianChallenge jobs from other projects sharing the same Aristotle account.

prompt_summary: Recon: Mathlib API survey for making OnePoint ℂ (= ℂℙ¹) a complex manifold via two-chart atlas — step (1) of aadb7721's genus-zero plan
notes: COMPLETE in ~18 min. New ~480-line recon file. Maps the entire `OnePoint` Mathlib API (Basic/ProjectiveLine/Sphere) plus ChartedSpace/IsManifold infrastructure. Key findings: (a) all required topology instances on `OnePoint ℂ` exist (Compact/T2/T4/Connected/Normal); (b) `OnePoint ℂ ≃ₜ S²` exists via `onePointEquivSphereOfFinrankEq`; (c) NO `ChartedSpace ℂ (OnePoint ℂ)` exists in Mathlib v4.28.0 — must build from scratch.
